title: Batch delete with form validation
description: Select rows, validate the delete confirmation, then delete. If the form has errors, stop and show a warning.

select-rows.title: 勾选要删除的记录
select-rows.description: 在表格中勾选需要删除的记录前面的复选框，可多选。

check-selection.title: 检查是否有选中
check-selection.description: 确认用户至少勾选了一条记录。

click-delete.title: 点击「删除」按钮
click-delete.description: 选好记录后，点击工具栏中的红色「删除」按钮。

show-no-selection-warning.title: 未选择任何记录
show-no-selection-warning.description: 请先勾选至少一条要删除的记录。

title: Employee onboarding (with optional draft save)
description: Walk through the form step by step. The 'Save draft' step is optional and can be skipped.

autofill.title: 自动填充示例数据
autofill.description: 点击「自动填充」快速填入示例数据，了解表单结构。
autofill.hint: 点击快速填入示例数据

step1-next.title: 前往下一步
step1-next.description: 完成个人信息后，点击「下一步」进入地址信息。
step1-next.hint: 点击进入地址信息填写

step2-next.title: 继续下一步
step2-next.description: 填写地址后，再次点击「下一步」进入就业信息。

decide-save-draft.title: Choose: save draft, skip, or submit
decide-save-draft.description: User can save a draft (optional), skip straight to submit, or submit directly.

save-draft.title: 保存草稿 (optional)
save-draft.description: 在提交前可以点击「保存草稿」保存进度。
save-draft.hint: 点击保存，随时可以继续填写

submit.title: 提交表单
submit.description: 确认信息无误后，点击「提交表单」完成入职登记。
submit.hint: 点击提交完成入职登记

title: Apply an action to every visible row
description: Loop through all visible table rows and click a per-row action. Demonstrates the `loop` node with a DOM-based source.

select-all.title: 全选
select-all.description: 点击表头的全选复选框。

loop-row-action.title: 对每行执行操作
loop-row-action.description: Iterates over selected rows and clicks the row action button on each.

click-row-action.title: Click the row's action button
click-row-action.description: Click the per-row action button (e.g. delete) on the current iteration row.
click-row-action.hint: 点击当前行的操作按钮
